rulings.Case Title: RYAN OMEGA et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses To Special Interrogatories, Requests For Admissions, Requests For Production Of Documents, And Form Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, May 27, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. IMO Industries Inc.'s motion to compel discovery responses to special interrogatories, requests of admissions, requests for production of documents, and form interrogatories is granted. No opposition filed. A hearing is required unless defendant¿s counsel advises the plaintiff of the tentative ruling and the plaintiff states that he does not wish to contest the tentative ruling. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: HAROLD DEMOSS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Honeywell International Inc. To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition, And To Produce Documents At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, May 27, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. PLAINTIFFS HAROLD DEMOSS, MARIA DEMOSS, FELIPE DEMOSS, HAROLD DEMOSS' Motion To Compel Defendant Honeywell International Inc. To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person(s) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition, And To Produce Documents At Deposition. Hearing required if any issues remain. If any issues remain, counsel are reminded to send an email, without further argument, identifying those issues, to contestasbetostr@sftc.org. = (220/HEK)
